title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Hypertension
description: Lavandula angustifolia tinctures contains a number of bioactive constituents, including linalool and linalyl acetate, which have been found to have a relaxing effect on blood vessels. These compounds work by reducing the tension in blood vessel walls, allowing them to relax and widen, which in turn lowers blood pressure. The vasodilatory properties of linalool and linalyl acetate help to counteract the vasoconstriction that is often associated with hypertension. The tincture's ability ...
